{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/101492831?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Finder16/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Finder16/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Finder16/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Finder16/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/Finder16", "id": 101492831, "login": "Finder16", "node_id": "U_kgDOBgyoXw", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Finder16/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Finder16/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Finder16/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Finder16/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Finder16/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/Finder16", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2025-67725", "cvss": {"score": 7.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-400", "name": "Uncontrolled Resource Consumption"}], "description": "## Summary

The `HTTPHeaders.add` method in Tornado accumulates values using string concatenation when the same header name is repeated. Due to Python string immutability, each concatenation copies the entire string, resulting in O(n²) time complexity.

Given Tornado's single event loop architecture, a single maliciously crafted HTTP request can block the server's event loop for an extended period, causing a Denial of Service (DoS).

**Severity:**  **High** if `max_header_size` has been increased from its default, **low** if it has its default value of 64KB.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00403, "percentile": 0.32519}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-c98p-7wgm-6p64", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-20T18:57:34Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-c98p-7wgm-6p64", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-c98p-7wgm-6p64"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2025-67725"}], "nvd_published_at": "2025-12-12T06:15:41Z", "published_at": "2026-07-20T18:57:34Z", "references": ["https://github.com/tornadoweb/tornado/security/advisories/GHSA-c98p-7wgm-6p64", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-67725", "https://github.com/tornadoweb/tornado/commit/771472cfdaeebc0d89a9cc46e249f8891a6b29cd", "https://github.com/pypa/advisory-database/tree/main/vulns/tornado/PYSEC-2025-266.yaml", "https://github.com/tornadoweb/tornado/releases/tag/v6.5.3", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-c98p-7wgm-6p64"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/tornadoweb/tornado/security-advisories/GHSA-c98p-7wgm-6p64", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/tornadoweb/tornado", "summary": "Tornado: Quadratic DoS via Repeated Header Coalescing", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-20T18:57:36Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-c98p-7wgm-6p64", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "6.5.3", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "tornado"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 6.5.3"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Tornado: Quadratic DoS via Repeated Header Coalescing
